## Scope

- Book chapter IDs:
- Course, lab, or project routes affected:
- Safety or physical-evidence impact:
- Version impact:

## Evidence

- [ ] `python3 curriculum/tools/validate.py` passes.
- [ ] The book renders for changed content.
- [ ] Central calculations, code, and circuit source were independently checked.
- [ ] Figures have captions, alt text, and recoverable source.
- [ ] No generated circuit SVG, solution, personal data, secret, or confidential
      partner material is included.
- [ ] Source and license attribution are complete.
- [ ] Commits include DCO `Signed-off-by:`.
